directive.title: RFQ status transition API with audit log wiring

auditor.summary: The build implements the core functionality correctly - database migration, schema update, state machine logic, PATCH endpoint, audit logging, and audit API endpoint are all present and functionally correct. However, the build is missing two critical test files required by the acceptance criteria (stateMachine.test.ts and statusRoute.test.ts), which brings the score below the PASS threshold. Additionally, there are some path resolution concerns and minor issues with the audit log payload structure. The build is recoverable with the addition of the missing test files and minor fixes.

top_issues.description: Test file not generated. Acceptance criteria requires 100% test coverage for state machine transitions
Test file not generated. Acceptance criteria requires 100% test coverage for all 6 route scenarios

The writeAuditLog function adds audit_timestamp to payload but the acceptance criteria requires timestamp field. The payload structure has audit_timestamp instead of timestamp, and the function doesn't include the server timestamp in the created_at field - it relies on DB default
